ValidationRule.description: Requires current-quarter Close Date before marking won.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( IsWon, OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(StageName)), OR( ISBLANK(CloseDate), CloseDate < DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), (FLOOR((MONTH(TODAY()) - 1) / 3) * 3) + 1, 1), CloseDate >= ADDMONTHS(DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), (FLOOR((MONTH(TODAY()) - 1) / 3) * 3) + 1, 1), 3) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 成交前結案日期必須落在本季內。
